description: US announces Section 301 tariff action on Chinese imports
USTR publishes proposed tariff list targeting Chinese imports
USTR finalizes 25 percent tariffs on 50 billion dollars of Chinese goods
First tranche of bilateral tariffs enters into force
USTR proposes tariffs on an additional 200 billion dollars of Chinese goods
Second tranche of bilateral tariffs enters into force
US implements tariffs on 200 billion dollars of Chinese imports
US postpones scheduled increase of tariffs
US extends suspension of tariff increase
US raises tariffs from 10 percent to 25 percent
USTR formalizes new tariffs on Chinese imports
